resources.string: Use a direct path to add an album
Show media from the selected albums
Show media not from the selected albums
Detects all the folders with media on this device and add them to the albums view
Removes all album groups and folder albums while keeping custom and cloud albums
Sets the sorting of photos and videos in grids. Current mode: %1$s
Lavender Photos will auto-open this tab at startup
Change what tabs are available in the bottom bar
At least one tab needs to exist
Privacy-first, performant, and stylish open-source gallery app

There isn\'t one! None of your data goes anywhere but this device. No AI is trained on it, no algorithms to harvest information, nothing. Lavender Photos has and always will be a privacy focused gallery app.
View more detailed information on licenses
Notifies of new version when you open the app. Does not auto-install the update

This updater does NOT download APKs. It only links to GitHub Releases. This means that these APKs don\'t go through the additional screening and testing performed at IzzyOnDroid, F-Droid or elsewhere.

The builds hosted on GitHub are always signed, checked, and verified by the developer (kaii-lb), but it is up to you whether you want to use them or not.

Lavender Photos never does auto-updates, and only ever updates with explicit user consent.

Locked Folder is a secure folder for your images and videos on this device.\nThe secured media is never uploaded anywhere and is always on-device, encrypted with a key unique to your device\'s password or fingerprint data.
The secured data cannot be restored if the password was forgotten or the fingerprint was removed.\nSecured items will be lost upon uninstall of the app, back them up accordingly.
Hold on while this media is processed
Backing up and encrypting your photos, hold on…

Secure folder is now encrypted! All your photos are now fully safe and untouchable by anyone.
As a precaution, a copy of your secured photos is now present in an export folder, you can find it in the albums page or under "Internal Storage/Android/media/com.kaii.photos/LavenderPhotos/Exports".
Use your biometric credentials to unlock
Move media out of Secure Folder?
Exports a folder of all your secured items, unencrypted
Exports a folder of all your secured items, raw (encrypted or not)
Exports a zip file of all your secured items
Exports of all your favourited items to a folder
Exports a zip file of all your favourited items
Exports the app settings and albums to a JSON file so they can be restored later. Does not save Immich logins or secured media.
Loads the app settings and albums from a JSON file. Will overwrite any existing settings.

This is a way to keep track of your best moments; With Lavender Photos that means favourites that sync across all apps that support it, with flawless management, and a highly performant system!

If you're coming from a previous version of Lavender Photos, all of your previous favourited items will be migrated to the new system.

Please keep your phone on and this app open.
Lavender Photos cannot transfer your favourites from the old version if you don\'t allow it permissions to do so! This means you\'ll lose your previously favourited items.
Store logs for debugging. Tap to view.
No log file is recorded as of yet.
Debug lavender snackbars whenever compose decides to do something stupid
Like deprecate a feature and not add an equivalent :D
Shows an finite progress bar with progress updating every second for 5 seconds
Goes over all media on device and adds it to the app\'s database. Use this if some images are not showing up
Start playing videos as soon as they appear on screen
Don\'t play audio when first starting video playback
Shows which way the user is seeking
Ask what to open videos with on tap from a grid
Change the audio track of this video
Default to overwriting instead of saving a copy when editing media
Automatically exit the editing view when you save the changes
Thumbnails are currently %1$s pixels. Higher values use more %2$s
Thumbnail are shown at max possible resolution. This uses the most %1$s
Allows for faster loading at the cost of storage usage
Erases thumbnail caches to free up storage
This will erase all the thumbnail caches on this device, freeing up storage. Thumbnail loading will take longer on the next startup.
Skips going back to the default tab when pressing the back button
High values lead to large image sizes.
Video playback stops when the end is reached
All videos that are under 30 seconds will be looped infinitely
All videos, regardless of duration, will be looped infinitely
This deletes all items in the trash bin, this action cannot be undone
Ask for confirmation before deleting any media
Keeps the media\'s date when copying or moving
Immediately and permanently delete items without moving to Trash Bin first
Allow screen capture in Secure Folder
Allow screenshots, screen recording and screen sharing while the Secure Folder is open. Secure content may also appear in the recent apps preview. Leave off to keep it protected
Allow Lavender Photos to discover photos on the device
Allow Lavender Photos to discover videos on the device
Allow Lavender Photos to discover photos and videos on the device
Optional permission. Is used for faster trash/delete functionality
This permission is necessary for app functionality
This permission is needed to find photos and videos on the device. Lavender Photos is very strict with what files it reads, and never shares or exploits this info.

This permission is optional, but is highly recommended. Manage Media permission allows Lavender Photos to use Android\'s Content Resolver API to trash/delete/move/copy media, which makes the process much smoother and more interoperable with other apps.
Move selected items to trash bin?
Move this media to Secure Folder?
This is a cloud only item
Remove these items from the album?
Requires a PIN when the app starts up. Empty PIN removes the lock
None of your media is protected!
Image viewer/video player background will be black
Shows an option to navigate to Secure Folder from the app\'s main dialog
Circular corners on thumbnails in photo grids
Fill the background with a blurred version of the current image
Whether tapping on a media item issues a short vibration.
Change the app\'s display language. May require app restart. Current: %1$s
Customize the app\'s look, change color palettes, and toggle dynamic theming
Select the color style of the app
Use colors from the device\'s wallpaper and system theme
Are you sure you want to remove this server address?
Are you sure you want to log out from this account?
Password cannot be identical to current one
Password must be at least 8 characters long
Allows album-level media backup to an Immich server

Immich is a self hosted photo and video management solution, that allows for anyone to host their own cloud backup server.

How to Use?

  • Self-host an Immich Server
  • Specify server address in Lavender Photos
  • Login using Immich user account
  • Go to any album, click on cloud icon
  • Start backing up your photos!
This album has no media or server is unreachable
Add or remove this item from cloud backup
Choose which albums to sync with the cloud
Refreshing will undo all your changes
Reconcile changes between Lavender Photos and the Immich server
QR Code representation of the share link
Manage access to scrolling and actions

Lavender Photos indexes media on your device to provide accurate dates, faster loading times, and better features. This is a one-time operation, and should take around 30s to 2mins depending on how many items there are on your device. If you interrupt the processes, it will resume on the next launch.
Building apps that redefine what\'s possible, without compromising safety and privacy
Helped shape, test, and improve the app from its very first days
Improved secure encryption systems and file recovery processes
